title: SSRF via x-proxy-url header
description: User-controlled x-proxy-url header is copied directly into libcurl and Puppeteer proxy settings without validation. Attacker can point the service at internal hosts or attacker-controlled proxies for traffic exfiltration.

title: SSRF via injectFrameScript/injectPageScript raw fetch
description: Raw Node fetch(x) on arbitrary user-supplied URLs bypasses the dedicated SSRF validator, then injects the response as JS into a Puppeteer page with setBypassCSP(true). Enables arbitrary internal-network reach plus script injection into the rendered DOM.

title: Global TLS verification disabled
description: SSL_VERIFYPEER=false set globally in curl-impersonate configuration. Every outbound hop is MitM-able. Combined with x-proxy-url S0, any authenticated caller can exfiltrate or tamper with upstream traffic.

title: DNS rebinding gap (TOCTOU)
description: SSRF validator resolves hostname once; fetcher re-resolves on request. No _hintIps pinning into curl/puppeteer options means a malicious DNS server can answer public IP at validation time and private IP at fetch time.

title: IPv4-mapped IPv6 bypass
description: Private CIDR list covers IPv6 ::127.0.0.0/104 but not ::ffff:0:0/96 (IPv4-mapped IPv6). Combined with Puppeteer subresource filter that only checks 'localhost' literal string, an attacker can reach 127.0.0.1 via ::ffff:127.0.0.1.

title: Bearer token used as Firestore document _id
description: Jina API bearer tokens are used directly as Firestore document IDs in the auth flow. Any read-path leak (logs, error messages, Firestore export) = live API key leak. Tokens should be hashed for storage.

title: Weak anonymous rate limit
description: Anon rate limit is 20 req/min/IP with no concurrency cap. 4 GiB per-file download cap in libcurl means a single caller can tie up substantial bandwidth. No circuit breaker against sustained abuse.

title: God classes in core hosts
location: src/api/crawler.ts (1374 lines); src/services/puppeteer.ts (1335 lines); src/api/searcher.ts (909 lines); src/services/snapshot-formatter.ts (865 lines)
description: Four core files exceed 800 lines each. crawler.ts owns cache I/O, engine routing, billing, HTTP handling, fallback chain — needs decomposition by responsibility.

title: No PR / CI test workflow
description: Only cd.yml exists. Triggered on push to main/ci-debug/dev and on tags. No separate ci.yml for PRs. PRs are not automatically built, linted, or scanned before merge.

title: Rate-limit + key cache copy-paste between Searcher and Serp
description: The rate-limit lookup + high-frequency key cache block is duplicated verbatim between SearcherHost and SerpHost. Should be extracted to a shared mixin or helper.

title: Firestore metadata + GCS body with no transactional guarantee
description: Cache write path writes Firestore metadata and GCS body as separate operations. A crash between writes leaves an orphan metadata row pointing at missing GCS object. No transaction or cleanup sweep visible.

title: "How it works" section is a DeepWiki badge
description: The architecture section of the README is literally an image badge linking to deepwiki.com/jina-ai/reader. No first-party architecture exposition in a 10.5k-star OSS repo.

title: Zero JSDoc on first-party TypeScript
description: Only well-commented file is minimal-stealth.js (adapted from third-party). Only first-party /** */ block in the crawl/search surface is on searchWithFallback in searcher.ts. Services are undocumented.

title: 11-month commit gap
description: Last push 2025-05-08; analysis date 2026-04-12. Ambiguous signal: either stable-in-maintenance or attention moved (DeepSearch, ReaderLM). 130 open issues suggest unresolved triage.

title: Missing CONTRIBUTING.md / CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md / SECURITY.md / CHANGELOG.md
description: Standard OSS hygiene files absent. No issue templates, no pull_request_template.md. Updates section in README is hand-maintained and stale (last entry 2024-07-15).

title: integrity-check.cjs is not an integrity check
description: 11 lines. Only checks that licensed/GeoLite2-City.mmdb exists. No checksum, no signature verification. Named misleadingly.

title: Stale dependency semver ranges
description: stripe ^11.x (current major is 17), axios ^1.3.3, express ^4.19.2, bcrypt ^5.1.0. All CVE-adjacent or EOL-approaching. No lockfile audit runnable without access to private submodule deps.

title: Private submodule blocks reproducible build
description: thinapps-shared is SSH-only private repo containing rate-limit, secrets, Firestore base classes, decorators (CloudHTTPv2, CloudTaskV2), 3rd-party clients, SecurityCompromiseError. Public repo does not compile without it. README dismisses it as 'not integral' but imports show otherwise.
